# Handcrafted

**Path:** `segments/handcrafted`

Segment-based recognition using handcrafted segment descriptors, matching, or structural similarity.

## Scope

**Include:** geometric segment features; handcrafted segment association

**Exclude:** learned segment embedding

## Papers (2)
